@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_edge_reject
P: provider_clock_skew ∧ boundary_equality ∧ valid_webhook_dropped
V: use_"<=300" ∧ clamp_skew ∧ monotonic_clock

[AUDIT]
Goal: fix_edge_reject.
Plan: provider_clock_skew and boundary_equality and valid_webhook_dropped.
Verify: use_"<=300" and clamp_skew and monotonic_clock.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_webhook_skew
C: webhook_verify ∧ abs(now-ts)>"300"⇒"401" ∧ edge_ts_rejects_valid
P: widen_skew(provider_only) ∧ clamp_abs_delta ∧ preserve_"401"_on_excess
V: valid_webhook_accepts ∧ stale>"300"+skew⇒"401" ∧ reg_test_passes
A: patch_verify_fn ∧ add_reg_test(edge_ts) ∧ min_fix

@flint v0 hybrid
G: stop_charge_loop
C: billing_overdue ∧ middleware ∧ boundary_hit
P: overdue⇒402 ∧ grace "24h" ∧ emit "402"_after_grace
V: no_loop ∧ single_402 ∧ grace_exact
A: min_fix ∧ reg_test ∧ boundary_case

@flint v0 hybrid
G: fix_overdue_middleware
C: overdue_state ∧ anchor("24h") ∧ anchor("402")
P: rule(overdue=>402) ∧ grace_window("24h") ∧ boundary_charge_loop
V: no_loop_at_boundary ∧ grace24h_exact ∧ returns("402")_post_grace
A: patch_min_fix ∧ add_reg_test(boundary="24h")

@flint v0 hybrid
G: modular_monolith
C: team=9 ∧ ddl="12 weeks" ∧ store="PostgreSQL" ∧ ops=platform_plus_sec ∧ traffic=steady
P: single_deploy_unit ∧ module_boundaries ∧ shared_db="PostgreSQL"
V: fits_team=9 ∧ ships_by="12 weeks" ∧ audit_ready
A: scaffold_modules ∧ enforce_boundaries ∧ setup_ci_cd ∧ compliance_logging

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_capsule_arch
P: eq(ops,platform_plus_sec) ∧ eq(traffic,steady) ∧ eq(split,compliance_ready)
V: anchors_verbatim ∧ compliance_ready_split ∧ postgres_fit
A: emit(default_arch) ∧ emit(short_why)

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver_capsule_arch.
Plan: eq(ops, platform_plus_sec) and eq(traffic, steady) and eq(split, compliance_ready).
Verify: anchors_verbatim and compliance_ready_split and postgres_fit.
Answer target: emit(default_arch) and emit(short_why).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: deliver_arch
C: "6" ∧ "9 weeks" ∧ "PostgreSQL" ∧ pt_mlops ∧ async_enrichment
P: worker_sidecar ∧ short_why
V: fits_team ∧ meets_ddl ∧ uses_pg
A: emit_arch ∧ emit_why

[AUDIT]
Goal: deliver_arch.
Constraints: "6" and "9 weeks" and "PostgreSQL" and pt_mlops and async_enrichment.
Plan: worker_sidecar and short_why.
Verify: fits_team and meets_ddl and uses_pg.
Answer target: emit_arch and emit_why.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: capsule_micro_arch
P: ops(pt_mlops) ∧ traffic(async_enrichment) ∧ split(worker_sidecar)
V: fits("6","9 weeks") ∧ uses("PostgreSQL") ∧ async_ok
A: emit(default_arch) ∧ emit(short_why)

[AUDIT]
Goal: capsule_micro_arch.
Plan: ops(pt_mlops) and traffic(async_enrichment) and split(worker_sidecar).
Verify: fits("6", "9 weeks") and uses("PostgreSQL") and async_ok.
Answer target: emit(default_arch) and emit(short_why).

@flint v0 hybrid
G: prevent_path_traversal
C: user_input_in_path ∧ ".." ∧ "download" ∧ no_sanitization
P: validate_filename ∧ resolve_path ∧ enforce_basedir_prefix ∧ reject_traversal
V: test_dotdot_payload ∧ test_absolute_path ∧ test_symlink ∧ assert_403
A: patch_handler ∧ add_tests ∧ audit_similar_routes

[AUDIT]
Goal: prevent_path_traversal.
Constraints: user_input_in_path and ".." and "download" and no_sanitization.
Plan: validate_filename and resolve_path and enforce_basedir_prefix and reject_traversal.
Verify: test_dotdot_payload and test_absolute_path and test_symlink and assert_403.
Answer target: patch_handler and add_tests and audit_similar_routes.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_path_traversal
C: user_input(req.query.file) ∧ no_sanitization ∧ "download"
P: contains("..") ∨ absolute_path ∨ null_byte
V: resolve(path).startsWith(baseDir) ∧ reject_traversal("..") ∧ whitelist_filename
A: sanitize_input ∧ path_confine(baseDir) ∧ audit_log(download)

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: "SELECT" ∧ "sort" ∧ user_input_concat ∧ invoice_admin_api
P: sql_injection_risk ∧ unvalidated_sort ∧ dynamic_order_by
V: whitelist_sort_columns ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_invalid_input
A: unit_test_injection ∧ static_analysis ∧ audit_db_logs

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: "SELECT" and "sort" and user_input_concat and invoice_admin_api.
Plan: sql_injection_risk and unvalidated_sort and dynamic_order_by.
Verify: whitelist_sort_columns and parameterize_query and reject_invalid_input.
Answer target: unit_test_injection and static_analysis and audit_db_logs.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: mitigate_sql_injection
C: user_input(req.query."sort") ∧ concatenated_into("SELECT")
P: whitelist("sort") ∧ parameterize_query ∧ reject_unknown_column
V: static_scan(no_concat) ∧ test_injection_payload ∧ only_allowed_sort_keys
A: patch_invoice_admin_api ∧ add_regression_test ∧ audit_log

[AUDIT]
Goal: mitigate_sql_injection.
Constraints: user_input(req.query."sort") and concatenated_into("SELECT").
Plan: whitelist("sort") and parameterize_query and reject_unknown_column.
Verify: static_scan(no_concat) and test_injection_payload and only_allowed_sort_keys.
Answer target: patch_invoice_admin_api and add_regression_test and audit_log.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: has_"async" ∧ has_"await" ∧ has_"next(err)"
P: load_batch ∧ db.fetchRows ∧ apply_rules ∧ db.save ∧ emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err_"next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
A: convert_"async"_"await" ∧ keep_"next(err)" ∧ preserve_order

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_reconcileBatch
C: uses("async") ∧ uses("await") ∧ minimal_change
P: load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics
V: order_preserved ∧ db_err→"next(err)" ∧ anchors_present("async","await","next(err)")
A: wrap_async_await ∧ try_catch(db)→next(err) ∧ keep_signature

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_reconcileBatch.
Constraints: uses("async") and uses("await") and minimal_change.
Plan: load_batch>db.fetchRows>apply_rules>db.save>emit_metrics.
Verify: order_preserved and db_err then "next(err)" and anchors_present("async", "await", "next(err)").
Answer target: wrap_async_await and try_catch(db) then next(err) and keep_signature.

@flint v0 hybrid
G: refactor_loadGatewayUser
P: session_check ∧ db.findUser ∧ flags.load ∧ audit.log ∧ next
V: db_err_forwarded ∧ "next(err)" ∧ minimal_change
A: convert_to_async ∧ await_each_step ∧ try_catch_next_err

[AUDIT]
Goal: refactor_loadGatewayUser.
Plan: session_check and db.findUser and flags.load and audit.log and next.
Verify: db_err_forwarded and "next(err)" and minimal_change.
Answer target: convert_to_async and await_each_step and try_catch_next_err.

G: refactor(loadGatewayUser)
C: anchors{"async"∧"await"∧"next(err)"} ∧ order=session_check▶db.findUser▶flags.load▶audit.log▶next
P: use(async_await) ∧ try{session_check∧db.findUser∧flags.load∧audit.log} ∧ catch(e)⇒"next(err)"
V: minimal_diff ∧ order_preserved ∧ anchors_verbatim
A: emit(loadGatewayUser.async) ∧ on(db_err)⇒"next(err)" ∧ call(next)
